legacy.content:
--- phase: 01-planning-docs-baseline verified: 2026-02-23T06:18:19.575Z status: human_needed score: 0/4 ---
# Phase 01: Planning docs baseline Verification Report
**Phase Goal:** PROJECT, ROADMAP, and REQUIREMENTS are aligned with DungeonBreak and Narrative Engine; Phase 01 has a clear context (desired outcome, constraints, non-goals) and at least one plan with concrete tasks; TASK-REGISTRY or phase plans reflect the task breakdown. **Status:** human_needed
## Automated Checks
| Check | Status | Details | |---|---|---| | node -e process.exit(0) | PASS | - |
## UAT Truths
| # | Truth | Status | Notes | |---|---|---|---| | 1 | PROJECT, ROADMAP, and REQUIREMENTS are aligned with DungeonBreak and Narrative Engine; Phase 01 has a clear context (desired outcome, constraints, non-goals) and at least one plan with concrete tasks; TASK-REGISTRY or phase plans reflect the task breakdown. | SKIPPED | Skipped in non-interactive mode. | | 2 | Plan 01 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. | SKIPPED | Skipped in non-interactive mode. | | 3 | PROJECT, ROADMAP, and REQUIREMENTS are aligned with DungeonBreak and Narrative Engine; Phase 01 has a clear context (desired outcome, constraints, non-goals) and at least one plan with concrete tasks; TASK-REGISTRY or phase plans reflect the task breakdown. | SKIPPED | Skipped in non-interactive mode. | | 4 | Plan 02 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. | SKIPPED | Skipped in non-interactive mode. |
## Gap Summary
- No blocking gaps found.
